ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

criteria_met: Invoice number 64866 in certificate (box 5) matches invoice number 64866 on the invoice.
Consignor 'Korab International AB' in certificate matches the invoice issuer 'Korab International AB'.
Consignee 'Fns Kagitcilik Matbaa Malz Paz San. Ve. Tic.Ltd.Sti' in certificate matches 'SOLD TO' party in invoice.
pairing_validation.motivation: All three pairing criteria are met: invoice number matches, consignor matches issuer, and consignee matches the SOLD TO party. Pairing is valid.

comparison_checkpoints.certificate_value: Korab International AB, Mårten Krakowgatan 2, SE411 04, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
comparison_checkpoints.invoice_value: Korab International AB, Mårten Krakowgatan 2, 411 04 Göteborg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Korab International AB' anywhere in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND in invoice header/logo area and footer. Exact match after normalization.
Certificate: 'Korab International AB' — Invoice header: 'Korab International AB'. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate country: 'Sweden'. Invoice address: 'Sweden'. VAT prefix 'SE' also confirms Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice header.
Country verification via explicit address and VAT prefix SE.

normalizations_applied: Postal code format: 'SE411 04' vs '411 04' — minor formatting difference, not identity-affecting.
comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Korab International AB' in Sweden. The invoice is issued by 'Korab International AB' at the same address in Sweden. Name is an exact match. Country is confirmed both by explicit address ('Sweden') and VAT prefix 'SE'. MATCH per rules 4.1.0, 4.1.2, 4.1.4.
comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Korab International AB' i certifikatet kan identifieras exakt i fakturans sidhuvud. Landet 'Sweden' överensstämmer i bägge dokumenten. MATCH.

comparison_checkpoints.certificate_value: Fns Kagitcilik Matbaa Malz Paz San. Ve. Tic.Ltd.Sti, Egemenlik Mah. 6106/33 Sok. No:4, Isikkent Bornova - Izmir 35070, Türkiye
comparison_checkpoints.invoice_value: Fns Kagitcilik Matbaa Malz Paz San. Ve. Tic.Ltd.Sti, Egemenlik Mah. 6106/33 Sok. No:4, Isikkent Bornova - Izmir 35070, Turkey

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has a 'SOLD TO' field which is a primary billing field.
Certificate: 'Fns Kagitcilik Matbaa Malz Paz San. Ve. Tic.Ltd.Sti'. Invoice SOLD TO: 'Fns Kagitcilik Matbaa Malz Paz San. Ve. Tic.Ltd.Sti'.
Certificate: 'Türkiye'. Invoice: 'Turkey'. These are the same country in Turkish vs English.

rules_applied.description: Priority order – SOLD TO is the primary billing field.
Country verification – Türkiye and Turkey are the same country.
Country name normalization – full name vs local name variation (Türkiye / Turkey).

normalizations_applied: Country name: 'Türkiye' (Turkish) normalized to equivalent 'Turkey' (English) — same country, different language.

evidence.raw_text:
Fns Kagitcilik Matbaa Malz Paz
San. Ve. Tic.Ltd.Sti

Fns Kagitcilik Matbaa Malz Paz San. Ve.
Tic.Ltd.Sti

comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'Fns Kagitcilik Matbaa Malz Paz San. Ve. Tic.Ltd.Sti' matches the invoice SOLD TO field exactly. Address is identical. Country 'Türkiye' in certificate is the Turkish-language name for Turkey, which matches 'Turkey' in the invoice. This is a standard country name normalization. MATCH.
comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Mottagaren 'Fns Kagitcilik Matbaa Malz Paz San. Ve. Tic.Ltd.Sti' i certifikatet kan identifieras exakt i fakturans 'SOLD TO'-fält. Landet 'Türkiye' (certifikat) motsvarar 'Turkey' (faktura) efter normalisering. MATCH.

comparison_checkpoints.invoice_value: 11 Reels: Duplex Board ... 9 Reels: Duplex Board ...

comparison_steps.description: No article numbers are stated in the certificate. Priority 1 not applicable.
Identify the identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning in the certificate: 'Duplex Board'. Search for this in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice line 1: '11 Reels: Duplex Board'. Invoice line 2: '9 Reels: Duplex Board'. 'Duplex Board' found exactly in both lines.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states '20 Reels'. Invoice states '11 Reels' + '9 Reels' = 20 reels total. The quantity '20 Reels' in box 6 is a packaging/quantity descriptor, not a separate identity-bearing product description. The identity-bearing term 'Duplex Board' matches exactly.
comparison_steps.result: 'Reels' is a packaging unit descriptor present in both documents. Product identity matches.

rules_applied.description: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Duplex Board' identified exactly in invoice.
Non-identity-bearing additions – packaging type 'Reels' is consistent in both documents.

comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: The certificate describes goods as '20 Reels, Duplex Board'. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning is 'Duplex Board'. This exact term appears in both invoice lines ('11 Reels: Duplex Board' and '9 Reels: Duplex Board'). The total number of reels (11+9=20) is consistent with the certificate's 20 Reels, though no summation is strictly required since 'Reels' is a packaging descriptor and the product identity 'Duplex Board' is verified. MATCH.
comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'Duplex Board' kan identifieras exakt i fakturans båda artikelrader. Förpackningstypen 'Reels' förekommer i båda dokumenten. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains 'GROSS 49,576 KGS'. This is the verification-grounding quantity.
comparison_steps.result: Verification-grounding quantity: GROSS 49,576 KGS (Gross Weight 49,576 KG).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate value: 49,576 KGS (GROSS). Invoice TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT: 49,576 KG. The comma in '49,576' in the certificate is a thousands separator (resulting in numeric value 49576). The comma in '49,576' in the invoice TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT field is also a thousands separator (numeric value 49576). Both yield 49576 KG.
comparison_steps.result: Numeric value 49576 matches exactly. Unit KGS/KG is equivalent. Category GROSS matches GROSS WEIGHT.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: '49,576' → normalized to 49576 (comma as thousands separator). Invoice TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT: '49,576' → normalized to 49576 (comma as thousands separator).
comparison_steps.result: Both values normalize to 49576. Values are identical.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice explicitly states 'TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT: 49,576 KG'. This matches the certificate's GROSS 49,576 KGS.
comparison_steps.result: Direct match on total gross weight.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice also states 'TOTAL NET WEIGHT: 49.576 MT'. Converting 49.576 MT = 49576 KG via 3B. This equals the same numeric value as the gross weight, which is unusual but does not constitute a contradiction since the certificate only claims GROSS and the certificate's value matches the TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT field exactly. No contradiction per 4.4.3.1.
comparison_steps.result: No contradiction — certificate claims GROSS and invoice GROSS matches.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 is the verification-grounding quantity field.
Förekomstkontroll – numeric value 49576 identified in invoice TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT.
Thousands separator normalization: comma removed from '49,576' → 49576.
Total weight in invoice – TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT: 49,576 KG matches certificate GROSS 49,576 KGS.

normalizations_applied: Unit normalization: KGS and KG treated as equivalent.

rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: In the certificate context, GROSS 49,576 KGS clearly uses comma as thousands separator (49576 kg gross weight for 20 reels of board is realistic). In the invoice, TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT is stated as '49,576 KG' — same convention. The invoice separately states TOTAL NET WEIGHT as '49.576 MT' (using period as decimal, = 49576 KG), confirming that '49,576 KG' = 49576 KG with comma as thousands separator. No ambiguity.

comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: 'GROSS 49,576 KGS'. After thousands separator normalization per 4.4.3.3, this is 49576 KGS (gross weight). Invoice states 'TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT: 49,576 KG', which after the same normalization is 49576 KG. Exact match on numeric value (49576), unit (KGS=KG), and weight category (GROSS). The invoice also states 'TOTAL NET WEIGHT: 49.576 MT' which = 49576 KG (same numeric value in different notation/unit) — the fact that NET WEIGHT equals GROSS WEIGHT is unusual but does not create a contradiction with the certificate since the certificate only claims GROSS and this is verified. MATCH.
comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets bruttovikt GROSS 49,576 KGS (49 576 kg) kan identifieras exakt i fakturans 'TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT: 49,576 KG' (49 576 kg) efter normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare. Viktkategori (GROSS) och enhet (KGS/KG) överensstämmer. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has explicit field 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Sweden'.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' field in invoice.

comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'Sweden' as country of origin. Invoice has an explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Sweden' field. Exact match with no normalization required. MATCH.
comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Ursprungslandet 'Sweden' i certifikatet överensstämmer exakt med fakturans 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Sweden'. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.evaluation: No LC reference found in certificate. Box 5 contains 'Invoice No:64866' and 'Order No:35734' — neither is a Letter of Credit reference.
All three criteria met: invoice number matches, consignor matches issuer, consignee matches SOLD TO.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Koncernstruktur – consignor search in all files
rule_evaluation_log.evaluation: Consignor 'Korab International AB' found in invoice header and footer. Exact match.
Exact name match: 'Korab International AB' in both documents.
Country 'Sweden' explicit in address. VAT prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden.
Invoice has 'SOLD TO' field (primary billing field). Used as authoritative consignee.
Exact name match between certificate and invoice SOLD TO field.
Certificate: 'Türkiye'. Invoice: 'Turkey'. Same country, different language form. Normalization per 4.5.4.
'Duplex Board' found exactly in both invoice description lines.
Packaging descriptor 'Reels' is consistent in both documents.
Box 7 contains 'GROSS 49,576 KGS'. This is the grounding quantity.
49576 (after thousands separator normalization) found in invoice TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT: 49,576 KG = 49576 KG.
Comma in '49,576' is a thousands separator in both documents. Normalized to 49576.
TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT: 49,576 KG matches certificate GROSS 49,576 KGS after normalization.
Explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Sweden' field found.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland kan alla verifieras. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) return MATCH. The certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce for Korab International AB (Sweden) describes 20 reels of Duplex Board weighing GROSS 49,576 KGS with origin Sweden. The invoice from Korab International AB confirms all these details: same consignor, same consignee (Fns Kagitcilik), same product (Duplex Board), matching gross weight (49,576 KG), and same country of origin (Sweden).
non_blocking_observations: Invoice date (2026-02-25) is 2 days before certificate issue date (2026-02-27), which is normal.
Invoice TOTAL NET WEIGHT (49.576 MT = 49,576 KG) equals TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT (49,576 KG) — unusual but not a contradiction since the certificate only claims gross weight.
